import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/components/PolicyEditorModal.tsx");import { Fragment, jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/PolicyEditorModal.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState, useEffect } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import { X, Save, Download, FileText, Sparkles, AlertCircle } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
export function PolicyEditorModal({
  isOpen,
  onClose,
  initialContent = "",
  initialTitle = "",
  mode = "create",
  onSave,
  aiGenerated = false
}) {
  _s();
  const [title, setTitle] = useState(initialTitle);
  const [content, setContent] = useState(initialContent);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("editor");
  const [metadata, setMetadata] = useState({
    documentType: "",
    careType: "",
    framework: "",
    version: "1.0",
    effectiveDate: "",
    reviewDate: "",
    owner: "",
    approver: "",
    tags: []
  });
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      setTitle(initialTitle);
      setContent(initialContent);
    }
  }, [isOpen, initialTitle, initialContent]);
  if (!isOpen) return null;
  const handleSave = () => {
    setSaving(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      if (onSave) {
        onSave({ title, content, metadata });
      }
      setSaving(false);
      alert("✅ Policy saved successfully!");
      onClose();
    }, 1e3);
  };
  const handleExport = () => {
    const blob = new Blob([content], { type: "text/plain" });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `${title || "policy"}.txt`;
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  };
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "oxz0", _fgB: 1779104382864, _fgD: true, className: "fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4", "data-fg-oxz0": "418.160:418.10432:/src/app/components/PolicyEditorModal.tsx:74:5:1923:8502:e:div:e:1", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "oxz1", _fgB: 1779104382864, className: "bg-[#0f2832] border border-[#1a3440] rounded-2xl w-full max-w-6xl max-h-[90vh] flex flex-col", "data-fg-oxz1": "418.160:418.10432:/src/app/components/PolicyEditorModal.tsx:75:7:2032:8382:e:div:xtetxtetxtetxte", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "oxz3", _fgB: 1779104382864, className: "p-6 border-b border-[#1a3440] flex items-center justify-between", "data-fg-oxz3": "418.160:418.10432:/src/app/components/PolicyEditorModal.tsx:77:9:2174:1263:e:div:ete", children: [

_s(PolicyEditorModal, "FY9KibqN3WOtrAXh7dCvHLO7y/Y=");

var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "PolicyEditorModal");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/PolicyEditorModal.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/PolicyEditorModal.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
